title: Zootopia 2
overview:
Judy Hopps and Nick Wilde continue working as partners in the police force. Without the chief’s permission, they get involved in hunting down a smuggler who is bringing prohibited items into Zootopia.

They catch him, but the pursuit causes significant destruction across the city. This greatly displeases the police chief, who sends them to partner therapy so they can sort out their issues.

Meanwhile, Judy is almost certain that a snake has infiltrated the city, even though no one believes her. Reptiles have long been forbidden from entering Zootopia. Still, Judy stubbornly tries to prove she is right and pulls Nick into the search for the snake.

This journey becomes a major test of Judy and Nick’s friendship and reveals secrets from the city’s past.

A wonderful continuation of one of the best animated films of our time, further deepening the main characters while harmoniously introducing new ones.
